access_key.Description: The access key to use when authenticating using a Storage Access Key.

ado_pipeline_service_connection_id.Description: The Azure DevOps Pipeline Service Connection ID.

client_certificate.Description: Base64 encoded PKCS#12 certificate bundle to use when authenticating as a Service Principal using a Client Certificate

client_certificate_password.Description: The password associated with the Client Certificate. For use when authenticating as a Service Principal using a Client Certificate

client_certificate_path.Description: The path to the Client Certificate associated with the Service Principal for use when authenticating as a Service Principal using a Client Certificate.

client_id.Description: The Client ID to use when authenticating using Azure Active Directory.

client_id_file_path.Description: The path to a file containing the Client ID which should be used.

client_secret.Description: The Client Secret which should be used. For use When authenticating as a Service Principal using a Client Secret.

client_secret_file_path.Description: The path to a file containing the Client Secret which should be used. For use When authenticating as a Service Principal using a Client Secret.

container_name.Description: The container name to use in the Storage Account.

endpoint.Description: `endpoint` is deprecated in favor of `msi_endpoint`, it will be removed in a future version of Terraform

environment.Description: The Cloud Environment which should be used. Possible values are public, usgovernment, and china. Defaults to public. Not used and should not be specified when `metadata_host` is specified.

key.Description: The blob key to use in the Storage Container.

lookup_blob_endpoint.Description: Whether to look up the storage account blob endpoint. This is necessary when the storage account uses the Azure DNS zone endpoint.

metadata_host.Description: The Hostname which should be used for the Azure Metadata Service.

msi_endpoint.Description: The path to a custom endpoint for Managed Identity - in most circumstances this should be detected automatically.

oidc_request_token.Description: The bearer token for the request to the OIDC provider. For use when authenticating as a Service Principal using OpenID Connect.

oidc_request_url.Description: The URL for the OIDC provider from which to request an ID token. For use when authenticating as a Service Principal using OpenID Connect.

oidc_token.Description: The OIDC ID token for use when authenticating as a Service Principal using OpenID Connect.

oidc_token_file_path.Description: The path to a file containing an OIDC ID token for use when authenticating as a Service Principal using OpenID Connect.

resource_group_name.Description: The Resource Group where the Storage Account is located.

sas_token.Description: The SAS Token to use when authenticating using a SAS Token.

snapshot.Description: Whether to enable automatic blob snapshotting.

storage_account_name.Description: The name of the storage account.

subscription_id.Description: The Subscription ID where the Storage Account is located.

tenant_id.Description: The Tenant ID to use when authenticating using Azure Active Directory.

use_aks_workload_identity.Description: Allow Azure AKS Workload Identity to be used for Authentication.

use_azuread_auth.Description: Whether to use Azure Active Directory authentication to access the Storage Data Plane APIs.

use_cli.Description: Allow Azure CLI to be used for Authentication.

use_msi.Description: Allow Managed Identity to be used for Authentication.

use_oidc.Description: Allow OpenID Connect to be used for authentication
